overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dimly lit neon bar interior, exiting onto the rain-slicked streets of Night City, and navigating through urban alleys and elevated plazas surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit bar interior with arcade machines

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar interior toward the exit doorway

entered.detail: curved wooden bar with bottles and glasses
purple neon skull mounted on the wall
retro-style arcade cabinet with glowing cyan and pink lights
backlit shelves stocked with various bottles
glass doorway leading to the street outside

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dimly lit cyberpunk bar featuring a curved counter with liquor shelves, a prominent purple neon skull sign, and retro arcade machines lining the wall. The camera moves steadily toward the exit doorway at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with holographic billboards and wet pavement

events.description: exiting the bar through glass doors into the neon-lit city street
transition from dim interior to bright neon exterior lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-slicked sidewalk surrounded by towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: towering buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and signage
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting the neon lights
large glowing digital advertisements on building facades
futuristic vehicles moving along the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the bar, the scene opens into a vast urban canyon of Night City. The wet sidewalk reflects the overwhelming neon glow from holographic billboards covering the skyscrapers. The player walks along the busy street as futuristic vehicles pass by and pedestrians share the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley leading to building entrance

events.description: turning into a narrower alleyway between high-rise buildings
approaching building entrance with red velvet ropes and escalator

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow alleyways and approaching a modern building entrance

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera in the narrow passage

entered.detail: brick wall covered with colorful posters and advertisements
modern building entrance with glass doors and overhead lighting
barrier ropes lining the path to the entrance
escalator leading up to an elevated plaza

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a narrower alley between buildings, leaving the main street behind. The walls are covered in posters and graffiti. Approaching a modern building entrance marked by red velvet ropes, an escalator structure becomes visible leading upward to an elevated area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated plaza with reflective flooring

events.description: ascending stairs into the covered elevated plaza area
pedestrian calls out 'Hey, Voss!' to the player character

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs into an elevated plaza and continuing through the covered walkway with reflective floors

notable_agents.action: standing near the vertical garden wall looking at a device

entered.detail: highly polished marble floor reflecting the overhead lights and surroundings
exposed metal beam ceiling structure with integrated lighting
living plant wall installed on the building facade
modern building with large glass windows and metallic framing

segments.scene_description: The player ascends into a covered elevated plaza featuring a highly reflective marble floor and exposed metal truss ceiling. A vertical garden wall adds greenery to the cyberpunk environment. The camera moves through this semi-enclosed space as a pedestrian calls out from the side, and modern glass architecture surrounds the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a cyberpunk bar into the sprawling, vertical architecture of Night City. It begins by moving past a curved liquor counter and retro arcade machines toward a distant exit, guided by the glow of a purple neon skull. As the camera emerges from the doorway, the scene opens into a vast urban canyon where rain-slicked sidewalks reflect the overwhelming light of holographic billboards and passing futuristic vehicles. The perspective then shifts away from the main street into a narrow, graffiti-covered alley, leading toward a modern entrance with red velvet ropes and an ascending escalator. Finally, the camera rises into a covered elevated plaza, transitioning from the gritty street level to a polished environment of reflective marble floors, glass architecture, and a lush vertical garden wall.
